detail.description:
The Diablo-like dark fantasy ARPG welcomes its brand-new Season 2, "Age of Bones"! The new class, the "Necromancer", descends to reshape the order of the battlefield!
〓GAME HIGHLIGHTS〓
[New Class—The Necromancer Has Arrived!]
The new class, the Necromancer, makes its official debut! The master of death arrives to reshape the order of the battlefield! Define your unique combat style—whether as a Necromancer, Barbarian, Ranger, or Elemental Mage, freely combine various affixes!
